title: Asana MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Asana MCP Server for Claude
Interact with Asana workspaces to manage projects and tasks
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Asana
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `asana` `project-management` `tasks` `team-collaboration` `workflow`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status asana
```

## Config
```json
{
  "asana": {
    "url": "https://mcp.asana.com/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status asana

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/asana-mcp-server
- https://developers.asana.com/docs/using-asanas-model-control-protocol-mcp-server
